title: 3 Surprising Facts About Starfish

segments.text: A starfish can regenerate its arms and even its heart.
And it gets weirder from here.
Some can even regenerate entire bodies from a single arm.
They have no brain but can still sense their environment.
Remember, they can regenerate hearts too!
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: Starfish can regrow limbs and even hearts! Follow for daily facts! 🌊
